name: Chat Message
desc: Sends a chat message or command from the client to the server.

fields.name: message
fields.desc: The chat message or command (commands start with /)

modules.name: AutoGG
modules.purpose: Send or intercept chat messages. AutoGG sends "gg" after death. Spammer sends repeating messages. ChatBypass modifies outgoing messages. Command system intercepts C01 for .prefix commands.

modules.name: Spammer
modules.purpose: Send or intercept chat messages. AutoGG sends "gg" after death. Spammer sends repeating messages. ChatBypass modifies outgoing messages. Command system intercepts C01 for .prefix commands.

modules.name: ChatBypass
modules.purpose: Send or intercept chat messages. AutoGG sends "gg" after death. Spammer sends repeating messages. ChatBypass modifies outgoing messages. Command system intercepts C01 for .prefix commands.

modules.name: Commands
modules.purpose: Send or intercept chat messages. AutoGG sends "gg" after death. Spammer sends repeating messages. ChatBypass modifies outgoing messages. Command system intercepts C01 for .prefix commands.
